attributes.action: De-escalate conflict in the Middle-East and refrain from joining the war
attributes.background: Help de-escalate the conflict by strengthening diplomatic negotiations and withdrawing permissions for the US to use UK military bases in any sort of offensive action against Iran, and limit UK involvement strictly to protecting British nationals and interests

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Withdraw involvement in war on Iran and seek diplomatic resolution" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/761718
